options.name: --help
options.description: Prints help information

options.description: The working directory

options.name: --no-restore
options.description: Doesn't execute an implicit restore during build

options.name: --no-build

options.name: --build-verbosity
options.description: Specifies the msbuild log verbosity during build

options.name: --log-build
options.description: Specifies if msbuild should log to command line

options.name: --tfms
options.description:
Specifies the target framework monikers. Use *
for all, separate by semicolon for multiple
values

options.name: --strict
options.description:
Specifies if error behavior should be strict.
When set to false, it continues even if build
errors are present

options.name: --tfms

Specifies the target framework monikers. Use *

options.name: --strict
options.description:
Specifies if error behavior should be strict.

options.name: --tfm
options.description:
Specifies the target framework to load the model
from. Is required when the project is
multi-targeted

options.name: --namespaces
options.description:
Specifies which namespaces to inspect. You can
specify multiple by separation by semicolon
multiple by separation by semicolon
By default it matches the cli tool version

options.name: --views
options.description:
Specifies which views to inspect. You can specify
multiple by separation by semicolon

options.name: --package-version
options.description:
Specifies which nuget package version to install.
By default it matches the cli tool version

options.name: --references
options.description:
Specifies if the project references should be
built
